comments: App chooses active primary-route metadata and sidebar state from route-meta
Direct routed pages are composed at the app root
Active section lookup and advisor-lane intent derive from assistant-first section metadata while `/ask` hash compatibility stays bounded here
Advisor-lane pages wrap the tab workspace and preserve initialTab intent
Explicit redirects normalize old deep links to the canonical route pages
Shell spacing and coral token rhythm flow through AppShell into all primary route pages
